## Session — 2026-04-28 09:15

Reviewed the latest architecture decision records and updated the knowledge graph with new entity relationships. The team agreed to adopt a layered search pipeline combining BM25 with vector similarity for improved retrieval quality.

### Decisions

- [decision] Adopt hybrid search pipeline (BM25 + vector) for all document queries
- [decision] Use FTS5 porter tokeniser for English-language content

### Pending Items

- [pending] Finalise the entity resolution strategy for duplicate person records
- [pending] Review the temporal index chunking parameters — current window size may be too narrow

### Actions

- [action: shape] Update the search configuration to enable hybrid mode by default
- [action: builder] Prepare Docker Compose override for the new embedding service

### Notes

Session covered sprint planning for the next iteration. Key focus areas include improving recall on the benchmark suite and reducing false positives in entity extraction. The team noted that current NDCG scores are trending upward but entity intent queries still need work.
